[PUBLISHED DATE]: June 13, 2025
[TITLE]: People of Pakistan Rally to Express Solidarity With Iran
[METADATA/INTRO]: Why it matters: The rally underscores the growing sentiment of solidarity among Islamic nations, particularly in the face of perceived external threats from the U.S. and Israel....
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: The rally underscores the growing sentiment of solidarity among Islamic nations, particularly in the face of perceived external threats from the U.S. and Israel. 
 It highlights the importance of unity for the stability of the Islamic world. The event in Lahore serves as a reminder of the regional dynamics at play and the potential for collective action. 
 As a result of the armed attacks by the Israeli regime in Tehran and several cities across the country since the early hours of Friday, June 13, 2025, several military commanders, scientists, and civilians have been martyred. 
 Following the continuation of these attacks, the people of Pakistan held demonstrations to condemn the Israeli regime's aggression and expressed their support for Iran's defense against these attacks.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: Unknown Date
[TITLE]: Tens of Thousands Protest Bush India Visit
[METADATA/INTRO]: Tens of thousands of Indians waving black and white flags and chanting "Death to Bush!" rallied Wednesday in New Delhi to protest a visit by President Bush. Surindra Singh Yadav, a senior police officer in charge of crowd control, said...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: "Up to 50,000 people will take part in the march, and we have the police permission to express our feelings," said Pushpender Grewal, secretary of the Communist Party of India. 
 "We will protest against the U.S. policies, especially the inhuman atrocities in Afghanistan and Iraq, a likely invasion of Iran and its continuing support to Israel's illegal occupation of Palestine." 
 Communists and Muslim groups have criticized New Delhi for backing a U.S. move to report longtime ally Iran to the International Atomic Energy Agency over allegations Tehran is developing nuclear weapons. Iran says its nuclear program is for peaceful purposes.

[PUBLISHED DATE]: 2023
[TITLE]: Thousands continue to march in support of Gaza in multiple cities worldwide | Israel-Palestine conflict News | Al Jazeera
[METADATA/INTRO]: In Pictures Thousands continue to march in support of Gaza in multiple cities worldwide...
[BEST EVIDENCE CHUNK]: Thousands continue to march in support of Gaza in multiple cities worldwide 
 Demonstrators express anger at the international community for perceived inaction in stopping Israel’s bombardment. 
 Thousands of people including women and children gathered on Sunday in Islamabad for the largest pro-Palestine rally in Pakistan since Israel’s war on Gaza began this October. 
 Protests also happened in other cities across the world on Sunday as attendees expressed considerable anger at the perceived inaction of the international community in stopping Israel’s bombardments. 
 Thousands of keffiyeh-clad demonstrators also turned up in Martyrs’ Square in central Beirut, Lebanon, showing solidarity with the Palestinians – especially those trapped in Gaza amid increasing tension on the Lebanon-Israel border, with Hezbollah fighters and the Israeli military exchanging fire.
